name: stock-liquidity
description: > Analyze stock liquidity using bid-ask spreads, volume profiles, order book depth, market impact estimates, and turnover ratios via Yahoo Finance data. Use this skill whenever the user asks about liquidity, trading costs, bid-ask spread, market depth, volume analysis, slippage, market impact, turnover ratio, or how easy/hard it is to trade a stock without moving the price. Triggers: "how liquid is AAPL", "bid-ask spread", "volume analysis", "order book depth", "market impact of a large order",
author: himself65
summary_zh: 基于雅虎财经数据的股票流动性分析工具，帮你评估买卖股票是否会推动价格及产生隐性成本，适合判断大单冲击或交易难度的场景。
